name: Priya Sharma
headline: Full Stack Developer | React & Node.js | Cloud Enthusiast
about: Experienced full-stack developer with 2 years of experience building scalable web applications. Transitioning towards AI/ML with recent self-study in LLMs and prompt engineering. Strong foundation in software engineering and cloud deployments.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Built microservices with Node.js and deployed on AWS ECS. Developed React dashboards for internal analytics. Started exploring AI integration with OpenAI API for chatbot features.

experience.title: Web Development Intern
experience.description: Developed frontend components in React. Built REST APIs with Java Spring Boot. Participated in Agile sprints.

projects.name: CloudDash - Real-time Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Full-stack analytics dashboard with React, Node.js, and AWS. Features real-time data streaming and visualization.

projects.name: ChatBot POC
